name: Limited Edition Alpha

draft.notes: Basic lands appear on all print sheets, so a land can take the place of a common, uncommon, or rare. No dedicated land slot.

sourceNotes: First printing of the original Limited Edition. Sold in 15-card booster packs (36/box) and 60-card starter decks. Striped collation, 11x11 sheets, common-uncommon-rare ordering. Two basic-land art variations. No foils (pre-1999). Alpha uncommon/rare sheets not fully known but believed to match Beta.
